# kestra-trigger-flow-with-inputs
Description: Learn how to manually trigger a Kestra flow from the UI, including how to locate it and fill in required input parameters.
Source: project
1. Navigate to your Kestra UI.
2. Locate the desired flow by its namespace and ID. The path is typically `[Namespace]` → `[Flow ID]`.
3. Click the "Execute" button for that flow.
4. A form will appear for input parameters. Fill in the required values for each input.
5. If default values are provided, review them and update if necessary to match your environment.
6. Confirm and execute the flow.
